title: Automation to create subitems based on values in multiple columns
excerpt:

posts.author: hrix (Heather Rix)
posts.cookedHtml:
Board item is created and has columns Class-1, Class-2…Class8. I want to create a subitem for each value in those columns.
Item
Subitem = details on Class-1
Subitem = details on Class-2
etc.

I haven’t found a way to do it without a button or forcing some column to change. Any ideas?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hrix - you can use the Autoboost app to set values on newly created subitems based on their parent item.

Hope this helps.
Mark

Green Llamas

posts.author: hrix (Heather Rix)
posts.cookedHtml: Tried it and it does work but not quite for my need. this rule would run and overwrite what i’d created in the last step.
